channel.title: CS-104 Data Transformation & Manipulation :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: CS-104 — Data Transformation & Manipulation 1 credit Working description Parsing, filtering, reshaping, aggregating data; applies B1 imperative-mutation and functional-transformation skills. CSV/JSON as sources and sinks (file formats used, not taught). Embedded data-minimization: what data, transformed how. To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
